name: GARTNER DUCT CYST
definition: secretory retention cyst of remnant mesonephric duct

demographics.Histo: lined by nonmucinous flat cuboidal / low columnar epithelium

dominant_finding: well-defined round lesion with fluid contents:
discriminating_features: well-defined round lesion with fluid contents:
hemorrhagic / proteinaceous contents hypointense on T2WI + hyperintense on T1WI
large cyst may displace ureter upward / protrude through introitus

general: well-defined round lesion with fluid contents:
hemorrhagic / proteinaceous contents hypointense on T2WI + hyperintense on T1WI
large cyst may displace ureter upward / protrude through introitus

clinical.Rx: cyst aspiration; tetracycline sclerotherapy; surgical excision
